description: Hi, I'm Preethi. I'm a Research Data Analyst with a background in Statistics and Data Science and a passion for healthcare research. I currently work in Radiology at UW–Madison, where I spend most of my time working with MRI data, neuroimaging pipelines, and research datasets.

What I enjoy most is solving complex data problems and figuring out how to turn messy real-world data into something meaningful. Whether it's troubleshooting an imaging pipeline, analyzing healthcare data, or learning a new technology, I love the process of understanding how things work and making them better.

Outside of work, I'm always looking for opportunities to learn. Lately, I've been exploring machine learning, medical imaging, and AI applications in healthcare. I enjoy collaborating with researchers, building practical solutions, and contributing to projects that can ultimately make a difference in patient care and scientific discovery.

items.description: Built automated workflows to collect, integrate, and analyze publication metrics from multiple sources. Evaluated relationships between citation counts and Altmetric scores using statistical analysis and visualization techniques to support research impact assessment within Global Medical Affairs
items.projectName: Research Impact Analytics Using Citation & Altmetric Data
